Candidate 1.comments: Decent fit to phenomenological  trends, but poor fit to concentration-time and time-rate data

Candidate 2.comments: Model does not capture [Ru] concentration rate correctly, concentration-time and rate-time fits are poor

Candidate 4.comments: phenomenological trends are captured quite well, time-rate curves are decently well fitting, however concentration-time curves are not a good fit, mechanism seems overly complicated (e.g. RuIII + Ru_Dimer -> Ru_Dimer + RuII step does not make chemical sense)

Candidate 5.comments: [Ru] concentration trend is not captured correctly

Candidate 6.comments: Phenomenological trends are not captured correctly ([Ru] concentration trend)

Candidate 8.comments: Unphysical time-rate profiles and [Ru] concentration trend is not captured correctly

Candidate 9.comments: Unphysical time-rate curves, unphysical reaction (RuII_ex + RuIII -> RuII + RuII), but good fit to [Ru] concentration trend (but this seems to be a case of right answer for the wrong reason)
